title: Apple Variants
description: A Mod that adds more variations od apples
body: Apple Variants adds new types of apples to the game, each with unique textures, effects, and drop mechanics. Whether you’re farming, exploring, or just hungry, you’ll now find different apples like green apples, golden apples, and more falling from regular leaves or hidden in special loot tables. A simple but juicy expansion to your Minecraft food system!
